Description: Requirement for item inspection before refund approval is not reflected in the requirements specification.
Conflict in return eligibility window between meeting transcript and requirements/decision artifacts.
Timing rules for return status notifications remain undecided but requirements specify notification events without defining timing conditions.
Requirement supporting prevention of duplicate return requests lacks explicit traceability to its originating elicitation evidence in the requirements specification.
Evidence: T7; B6; AC3; absence in R1-R14

Description: Access control requirement restricting return/refund management to authorized staff is absent from the requirements specification.
Handling of timezone differences for deadlines and status timestamps is raised but not defined in requirements or decisions.
Evidence: T8; absence in R1-R14; absence in AC1-AC8

Description: Requirement for customers to view refund method and expected processing time before confirmation is not captured in the requirements specification.
